untranslatable_reason: Pattern recognition requires detecting two specific bottom lows separated by exactly 43 days with <1% price difference, volume comparison between two specific bars, and exclusion of triple bottoms. These multi-bar pattern matching capabilities (identifying dual lows, measuring inter-low separation days, relative volume between non-consecutive bars, and triple-bottom exclusion logic) are not expressible using the available point-in-time indicators and operators. Would require custom pattern detection function or bar-sequence analysis not supported by this rule schema.
translation_notes: Attempted to approximate with volume ratio and breakout conditions, but the core EADB pattern logic (dual bottom identification with precise day separation and relative volume analysis) cannot be faithfully represented. The signal requires stateful pattern matching across multiple historical bars rather than point-in-time indicator values.
